governanceNote: All rejection codes are SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE. Globally unique across namespaces. Codes are emitted by agents and consumed by PQG for metrics. No free-text rejection permitted system-wide.

PSAR_v1.0_vs_PSCA_v2.0.description: PRESSURE-SIGNAL-AUDIT-RECORD.md v1.0 Section X lists PSCA codes under the label 'from PSCA contract' but uses names that do not match PRESSURE-SIGNAL-CRITIC-AGENT.md v2.0 Section V. PSCA v2.0 is authoritative. PSAR v1.0 names are recorded below as legacyAlias for traceability.

unmappedPSARCodes.REJECT_NON_ACCIDENTAL_EMERGENCE: Present in PSAR v1.0 only. No corresponding check in PSCA v2.0. Likely a PSCA v1.0 code removed or merged in v2.0 upgrade. Retained for audit completeness.
unmappedPSARCodes.REJECT_MISCLASSIFIED_OVERWEIGHT: Present in PSAR v1.0 only. No corresponding check in PSCA v2.0. Likely a PSCA v1.0 code removed or renamed. Retained for audit completeness.

CIV.description: Canonical Integrity Validator rejection codes. Emitted post-canonicalization, pre-commit. One code per validation check. Source: CANONICAL-INTEGRITY-VALIDATOR.md v1.0 Section V.

REJECT_SCHEMA_INCOMPLETE.description: Required fields missing, unknown fields present, or missing enum fields.

REJECT_ENUM_INVALID.description: Enum field value not present in Canonical Enum Registry or does not match enumVersion snapshot.

REJECT_IDENTITY_CONTAMINATION.description: Proper noun, unabstracted named entity, or literal name found in structural fields.

REJECT_TIME_SHAPE_INVALID.description: timestampContext missing, malformed, or contains illegal fields. season absent or phase enum invalid.

REJECT_ID_HASH_MISMATCH.description: canonicalID does not match deterministic hash recipe. Structural identity key mismatch.

REJECT_VERSION_MISMATCH.description: schemaVersion, enumVersion, or contractVersion does not match orchestrator cycle snapshot.

REJECT_LANE_FIELD_CONTAMINATION.description: Pressure object contains narrative fields (subclass, lifecycle metadata) or narrative object contains pressure fields (clusterSignature, structuralSourceIDs). Lane purity violated.

PSCA.description: Pressure Signal Critic Agent verdict codes. Emitted during PSCA evaluation of PSAR proposals. Source: PRESSURE-SIGNAL-CRITIC-AGENT.md v2.0 Section V. PSCA v2.0 names are authoritative; see conflictLog for PSAR v1.0 aliases.

PASS_ALL_CHECKS.description: Proposal passes all structural validity checks. Eligible for PSTA canonical mint.

REJECT_INSUFFICIENT_DOMAIN_DIVERSITY.description: domainDiversityCount < MIN_DOMAIN_DIVERSITY (2). Single-domain clusters are structurally insufficient.

REJECT_INTENTIONAL_THEATER.description: containsSymbolicStaging = true. Cluster contains intentional theatrical staging.

REJECT_NARRATIVE_COMPLETE.description: Cluster independently forms a complete story. Narrative saturation disqualifies pressure signal.

COLLAPSE_FRAGMENTED_STAGED_UNIT.description: Signals are fragments of a unified staged act. Collapse directive issued.

REJECT_MEANING_LEAKAGE.description: containsInterpretiveLanguage = true. Interpretive language present in pressure candidate.

RECLASSIFY_OVERWEIGHT_SIGNAL.description: containsOutcomeEncoding = true. Signal carries overweight narrative encoding; reclassify to media event or narrative environment.

REJECT_NON_ACCIDENTAL_EMERGENCE.description: Present in PSAR v1.0 minimum required codes. No corresponding check in PSCA v2.0. Likely PSCA v1.0 remnant.

REJECT_MISCLASSIFIED_OVERWEIGHT.description: Present in PSAR v1.0 minimum required codes. No corresponding check in PSCA v2.0. Likely PSCA v1.0 remnant.
